home.heroSubtitle: Allen Green provides vegetable cutting, cleaning, peeling, meat processing, and dough preparation machines for commercial kitchens and food factories.
home.strengthText: Jinan Ailin Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd. develops practical food processing equipment with stable stainless-steel structures, flexible cutter configurations, and responsive service for overseas buyers.

advantages.title: Stainless Structure
advantages.text: Food-contact designs prepared for commercial kitchen and processing environments.

advantages.title: Flexible Cutting
advantages.text: Multiple blade options support slices, strips, dices, segments, and cubes.

advantages.title: Export Ready
advantages.text: Product manuals, certificates, and remote support are prepared for overseas customers.

advantages.title: Practical Service
advantages.text: Machine selection, process advice, packing guidance, and quick communication.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Select a category to review representative Allen Green machines and core parameters.

detail.descriptionText: This machine is designed for food preparation environments that need stable operation, easy cleaning, and repeatable processing results. Configuration, cutter sets, and production flow can be discussed according to your material, output, and workshop layout.

about.title: About Jinan Ailin Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd.
about.intro: Jinan Ailin Machinery Equipment Co., Ltd. focuses on food processing machinery for commercial kitchens, catering companies, and food factories. The company provides vegetable processing, meat processing, dough preparation, and supporting kitchen equipment.
about.countries: United States, Mexico, Brazil, Turkey, India, Vietnam, Indonesia, Egypt, Italy, Spain, Poland, South Africa

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Send your material, required output, and target cutting effect. Our team will recommend suitable machine models.

form.success: Inquiry logged in console. Ready for EmailJS or Formspree integration.

footer.brief: Food processing machinery for vegetable cutting, cleaning, peeling, meat processing, and dough preparation.
